summary: Completed comprehensive testing of updated Faculty CRM games system. Successfully migrated from mystery_box and lucky_button to slot_machine and scratch_card. All 3 active games (Roulette, Tragamonedas, Raspadita) are working correctly with proper backend APIs, frontend interfaces, and admin configuration.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 400 when user already played (max plays limit)

passed_tests: GET /api/games/config returns exactly 3 games: roulette, slot_machine, scratch_card
POST /api/games/play with slot_machine returns prizes and coupons
POST /api/games/play with scratch_card returns prizes and coupons
/game/slot_machine page loads with registration form and slot machine interface
/game/slot_machine shows 3 reels with TIRAR LA PALANCA button
/game/scratch_card page loads with registration form and OBTENER MI RASPADITA button
/game/scratch_card shows golden scratch layer with Canvas-based scratching
/game/roulette still works correctly with spinning animation
Admin games config page shows 3 games: Ruleta (🎡), Tragamonedas (🎰), Raspadita (🎟)
QR Links tab shows correct links for slot_machine and scratch_card (old games removed)
Slot machine gameplay: 3 spinning reels, staggered stopping, prize reveal with confetti
Scratch card gameplay: golden layer scratching reveals prizes underneath
All games show proper prize messages and coupon codes
Registration forms work for all game types
Game integrations with backend API working correctly

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (All game pages, admin config, and gameplay functionality working)
